sessions.title: Baseline Check
sessions.principle:
Pressure reveals what is real.
Control shows when it gets hard.
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we tell the truth and return to stance.
Delay is a choice.
Say it out loud. Twice.
sessions.prompt: Answer from your last match or practice.
questions: What did you actually do under pressure?
What excuse did you tell yourself?
What should you have done instead?
What is your command when things break?
sessions.deliverable:
Write:
- distraction
- action
- excuse
- correction
- command
Rate: F/E/A/R (1–10)

scripture.text: Whoever rules his spirit is better than he who takes a city.

sessions.title: Distraction Control
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we return immediately.
No drifting.
Say it out loud. Twice.

scripture.text: Set your mind on things above.

sessions.title: Control vs Noise
sessions.principle: Control what you can. Ignore the rest.
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we control what we can.
Noise is ignored.
Say it out loud. Twice.

scripture.text: Let your eyes look straight ahead.

sessions.title: Stay in the Moment
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we work the next task.
Stay present.
Say it out loud. Twice.
sessions.prompt: Where did you leave the moment?

sessions.title: Clock Control
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we wrestle the position.
Not the clock.
Say it out loud. Twice.
sessions.prompt: What happens when you see the clock?

scripture.text: Teach us to number our days.

sessions.title: Task Under Pressure
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we return to task.
Emotion does not lead.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Command Lock
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we use command.
Drift is not allowed.
Say it out loud. Twice.
questions: What do you say when things break?

sessions.title: Action Over Outcome
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we act.
No hesitation.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Effort Standard
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, effort is required.
Not optional.
Say it out loud. Twice.
questions: What does full effort look like?

scripture.text: Do it with all your might.

sessions.title: Half Effort Truth
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we give full effort.
No half work.
Say it out loud. Twice.
sessions.prompt: Where do you give half effort?

sessions.title: Fatigue Response
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, effort continues under fatigue.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Consistency
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we are consistent.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Attitude Under Pressure
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, attitude stays controlled.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Blame vs Ownership
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we take ownership.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Mistake Recovery
sessions.principle:
Mistakes are not the problem.
Delay is.
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we recover immediately.
Say it out loud. Twice.
questions: How long do you stay there?

sessions.title: Emotional Control
sessions.principle:
Emotion is natural.
Lack of control is a choice.
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we control emotion.
Emotion does not control action.
Say it out loud. Twice.
questions: What does it make you do?

scripture.text: Better a patient person than a warrior.

sessions.title: Frustration Control
sessions.principle: Frustration is a test of discipline.
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, frustration stays controlled.
Say it out loud. Twice.

scripture.text: A person without self-control is like a city broken into.

sessions.title: Body Language
sessions.principle: Your body speaks before your words.
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, body language stays strong.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Talking Under Stress
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we speak with control.
Say it out loud. Twice.
sessions.prompt: What do you say under stress?
questions: What do you say when losing?

scripture.text: Let no corrupt talk come out of your mouths.

sessions.title: Self-Talk
sessions.principle: Your inner voice drives your actions.
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we control self-talk.
Say it out loud. Twice.

scripture.text: Be transformed by the renewing of your mind.

sessions.title: Respect Standard
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, respect is visible.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Coach Respect
sessions.principle: Respect shows in listening and action.
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we respond to coaching.
Say it out loud. Twice.
sessions.prompt: How do you respond to coaching?

sessions.title: Opponent Respect
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we compete with respect.
Say it out loud. Twice.
questions: What is your mindset toward them?

sessions.title: Room Respect
sessions.principle: How you act in the room reflects your discipline.
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we respect the room.
Say it out loud. Twice.
sessions.prompt: How do you treat the room?

scripture.text: Conduct yourselves in a worthy manner.

sessions.title: Respect Under Pressure
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, respect stays under pressure.
Say it out loud. Twice.
sessions.prompt: Does your respect change under pressure?

scripture.text: A gentle answer turns away wrath.

sessions.title: Daily Discipline
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, discipline shows daily.
Say it out loud. Twice.

scripture.text: No discipline seems pleasant at the time.

sessions.title: Consistency of Respect
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, respect is consistent.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Identity Check
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, identity matches action.
Say it out loud. Twice.

scripture.text: By their fruit you will know them.

sessions.title: Pattern Recognition
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we identify patterns.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Correction Plan
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we correct immediately.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Standard Lock
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we hold standards.
Say it out loud. Twice.
questions: What do you expect from yourself?

sessions.title: Self-Honesty
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we tell the truth.
Say it out loud. Twice.
sessions.prompt: Where are you lying to yourself?

scripture.text: The truth will set you free.

sessions.title: Accountability
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we take responsibility.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Discipline Loop
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we repeat discipline.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Mental Reset
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we reset fast.
Say it out loud. Twice.

scripture.text: Be renewed in the spirit of your mind.

sessions.title: Pressure Identity
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, pressure reveals us.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Final Standard
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we live our standard.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Execution Truth
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we execute.
Say it out loud. Twice.

sessions.title: Final Reflection
sessions.houseStandard:
In this house, we reflect honestly.
Say it out loud. Twice.
